allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('supabase/ssr:', p.dependencies['@supabase/ssr']\); console.log\('supabase/supabase-js:', p.dependencies['@supabase/supabase-js']\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies['next']\); console.log\('react:', p.dependencies['react']\);")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@supabase/realtime-js/dist/main/RealtimeClient.js', 'utf8'\); const m = src.match\(/heartbeat.*?\(\\d+\)|timeout.*?\(\\d+\)|reconnect.*?\(\\d+\)/g\); console.log\(m ? m.slice\(0,10\) : 'not found'\);")
